baseline-empty-only.estimatedLockTime: Not applicable; permitted only on a verified empty schema
baseline-empty-only.tableSizeQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=DATABASE()
baseline-empty-only.progressQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=DATABASE()
baseline-empty-only.failureRecovery: Drop the isolated empty database and rerun the complete Flyway chain
baseline-empty-only.backupPoint: No backup required after the empty-schema precondition is verified

online-expand.estimatedLockTime: Metadata lock target <= 5 seconds per DDL after capacity review
online-expand.tableSizeQuery: SELECT table_name,table_rows,data_length,index_length FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=DATABASE() AND table_name IN (${tables})
online-expand.onlineDdl: Prefer ALGORITHM=INSTANT; otherwise INPLACE LOCK=NONE after rehearsal
online-expand.batchSize: DDL only; backfill statements must use the backfill-batched profile
online-expand.progressQuery: SELECT version,success,installed_on FROM flyway_schema_history ORDER BY installed_rank DESC LIMIT 5
online-expand.failureRecovery: Leave expanded nullable/defaulted structures in place, repair Flyway only after isolated restore validation
online-expand.backupPoint: Encrypted full backup plus binlog coordinates immediately before migration

backfill-batched.estimatedLockTime: Metadata lock target <= 5 seconds; data batches target <= 2 seconds
backfill-batched.tableSizeQuery: SELECT table_name,table_rows,data_length,index_length FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=DATABASE() AND table_name IN (${tables})
backfill-batched.onlineDdl: Expand first; no column contraction in this profile
backfill-batched.batchSize: 1000 rows per transaction unless rehearsal records a lower value
backfill-batched.progressQuery: Migration-specific remaining-row predicate recorded in the deployment ticket
backfill-batched.failureRecovery: Resume idempotent batches from the recorded high-water mark; restore only for invariant violation
backfill-batched.backupPoint: Encrypted full backup plus binlog coordinates immediately before migration
backfill-batched.compatibilityWindow: Dual-write/read fallback retained for at least one release

data-repair.estimatedLockTime: No planned table lock; row locks bounded by batch predicate
data-repair.tableSizeQuery: SELECT table_name,table_rows,data_length,index_length FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=DATABASE() AND table_name IN (${tables})
data-repair.batchSize: 1000 rows or a smaller rehearsed batch
data-repair.progressQuery: Migration-specific inconsistent-row count must reach zero
data-repair.failureRecovery: Stop writers for the affected invariant, resume idempotent repair, compare ledgers before reopening
data-repair.backupPoint: Encrypted full backup plus binlog coordinates immediately before repair
data-repair.compatibilityWindow: No contract operation; old readers remain valid

contract-approved.estimatedLockTime: Must be measured on a production-sized restored snapshot
contract-approved.tableSizeQuery: SELECT table_name,table_rows,data_length,index_length FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=DATABASE() AND table_name IN (${tables})
contract-approved.onlineDdl: INPLACE LOCK=NONE only when supported; otherwise approved maintenance window
contract-approved.progressQuery: SHOW PROCESSLIST plus performance_schema metadata lock queries
contract-approved.failureRecovery: Application rollback must not require removed schema; restore snapshot for destructive failure
contract-approved.backupPoint: Signed encrypted backup and verified restore immediately before execution
contract-approved.compatibilityWindow: Contract only after previous release is fully retired
